title: BEM-851 route 850
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:47 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem850_verify_fail_closed_response_file.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='bem844_response_file_present':
    status='process_bem844_response_next'
    next_action='parse bem844_claude_response.md and create agreed protocol or BLOCKED protocol report'
elif ps=='dispatch_results_missing_for_fail_closed':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem851_result_writer_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v14','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-851 repair dispatch result missing for fail-closed writer','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif ps=='runtime_missing_for_fail_closed':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem851_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v14','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-851 repair runtime missing for fail-closed writer','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
elif ps=='fail_closed_writer_not_executed':
    status='inspect_dispatcher_writer_placement_next'
    next_action='inspect and patch dispatcher YAML placement of ensure_claude_response_file.py'
else:
    status='unknown_bem850_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-850 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-851','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem851_route_after_bem850.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem851_route_after_bem850.md').write_text('# BEM-851 | Route After BEM-850 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-851'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem851_route_after_bem850.json','governance/reports/bem851_route_after_bem850.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-850 fail-closed response verification and selected next exact step')
